analysis.reasoning: Core message: The EU sends ASEAN Day greetings, stressing joining forces to combat Covid-19 and promote sustainable economic recovery, tagging EU in ASEAN. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not explicitly about EU history or overcoming past internal obstacles; no. EU2 (EU is united) – it mentions "joining forces" generally, but not EU internal unity or solidarity among member states; ambiguous and not evidenced; no. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – focuses on external partnership and global recovery, not internal EU measures; no. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – mentions sustainable economic recovery but does not position EU as a pioneer or leader; insufficient; no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – no references to democracy/human rights; no. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – yes: it frames the EU as partnering with ASEAN, working together against Covid-19 and for sustainable recovery, highlighting cooperation and global well-being.
